gate_name: Resolved H I velocity field / kinematic regularity
evidence_summary: SPARC Rotmod radial curve is available and reaches a flat outer plateau, but this is not a 2D H I velocity-field/asymmetry map.
claim_boundary: outer rotation-curve support is stronger than before, but resolved H I map evidence is still missing
next_required_observation: 2D resolved H I velocity field with approaching/receding sides, warp/lopsidedness, and outer-curve quality flags

evidence_summary: Scalar RHI/Rdisk is very extended and Rotmod gives a gas mass-model contribution, but no H I surface-density map/profile was available in the current audit.
claim_boundary: nonparticipating gas is not established without resolved H I surface-density evidence
next_required_observation: H I column-density map/profile and comparison to optical disk/star-forming disk

evidence_summary: SPARC outer Rotmod mean V=65.22 km/s, std=0.24 km/s, slope=-0.134 km/s/kpc.
claim_boundary: flat radial curve supports taking the mismatch seriously, but does not by itself distinguish failed/stalled from clean falsifier
next_required_observation: rotation-curve source audit including sides, inclination treatment, and outer H I geometry

evidence_summary: No SFR/depletion-time measurement was ingested in M30. Gas-rich status alone cannot decide young forming versus stalled/failed.
claim_boundary: failed/stalled interpretation needs SFR or depletion-time evidence before becoming physical claim
next_required_observation: SFR, H I/H2 depletion time, or star-formation-efficiency measurement

evidence_summary: No stellar age or metallicity constraint was ingested in M30. The audit cannot tell whether the system is truly young or stalled over long timescales.
claim_boundary: juvenile versus failed/stalled remains provisional without stellar-population evidence
next_required_observation: stellar age/metallicity, color-based population proxy, or resolved stellar-population study

evidence_summary: SIMBAD/NED/source-discovery pages were located, but M30 did not ingest a quantified neighbor/group/tidal-history measurement.
claim_boundary: disturbance/environment cannot be ruled in or out from current scalar artifacts
next_required_observation: neighbor/group catalog check and literature search for tidal/asymmetry notes

evidence_summary: DDO161 and other M29 juvenile-forming rows share gas-rich/extended/low-stellar traits without UGC07125's severe under-rotation.
claim_boundary: analog contrast supports separating UGC07125 from the juvenile prototype, but does not prove failed-galaxy physics
next_required_observation: matched resolved H I/SFR comparison between UGC07125 and juvenile-forming analogs such as DDO161
